EmailTemplate.name: ASCN-Azure-O365-Licenses-InitialNotification
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #set($currentYear = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getActivated(),"YYYY")) #set($dueDate = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getExpiration(),"MMM. dd ")) #if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end
#if ($workItem.getOwner().isWorkgroup()) Hello,

A new Access Review has been assigned to the $workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName() Workgroup and requires action.

This message has been sent to all members of this Workgroup. Any Workgroup member may take action.

#else #if ($workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName()) Dear $workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName(),
#elseif($workItem.getOwner().getFirstname()) Dear $workItem.getOwner().getFirstname(),
#else Dear $workItem.getOwner().getName(),
#end

Each year, Ascension Technologies asks leaders to review software license renewals to confirm the need and manage resources efficiently. A valid reason to keep an Office 365 license is if Office tools (such as Word and Excel) are essential for important business tasks or required for the job.

You have a direct report(s) with an Office 365 license expiring on Nov. 27. Please confirm if they still need it by following the directions below.

#end

Instructions to complete an Office 365 license access review for your associate(s).

  • Login to SailPoint
  • Click Start to begin an access review.
  • Review each line item, selecting Approve or Revoke, and click Save Decisions. Note, Only 10 line items appear by default. Click through all pages to ensure you have reviewed all necessary items.
  • Complete the review by clicking Sign-Off Decisions.

Note: Incomplete attestations will result in an escalation message to your leader on Nov. 14

If you have any questions on transferring or completing attestations, consult the attestation resource guide. For issues, contact the Ascension Technologies Service Desk.

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying work item owners of new certifications. Arguments --------- workItemName (String): The name of the Workitem workItem (Workitem): The Workitem object certification (Certification): The Certification Object requesterName (String): The display name of the Identity that requested the certification

Argument.name: workItemName
Argument.Description: The description property (also the name property) of the certification WorkItem.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that requested the certification.

Argument.name: ownerName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that owns the certification.

EmailTemplate.Subject: -secure- Access Review Requires Action: Review Office 365 access for your direct report
